Who We Are

Precision, Integrity,
Results

RASCO Group LLC is a New York City-based real estate services firm delivering construction project management, compliance, and owner's representation across commercial, residential, and hospitality asset classes.

From multimillion-dollar luxury hotel renovations and Class-A office repositionings to retail rollouts and NYC condominium upgrades, our team brings institutional-grade execution to every project.

Construction PM
End-to-end management from pre-construction through closeout.
Compliance
DOB, ECB, HPD, LL87, TCO/CO tracking and violation resolution.
Owner's Rep
Acting as your advocate with developers, contractors, and agencies.
Real Estate Advisory
Due diligence, feasibility, LOI and lease negotiation support.
What We Do

Comprehensive Services for Complex Properties

01
Construction Project Management

Full-scope project oversight from concept through certificate of occupancy, with rigorous cost and schedule control.

  • Pre-construction planning & budgeting
  • Contractor procurement & oversight
  • Owner's representative services
  • Residential & commercial fit-outs
  • Hotel & hospitality renovations
02
Building Compliance & Violations

Expert navigation of NYC regulatory requirements from initial violation through final certificate of correction.

  • DOB, ECB & HPD violation resolution
  • LL87 energy audits & benchmarking
  • TCO / CO tracking & expediting
  • Permit acquisition & PACO filings
  • Code compliance upgrades
03
Real Estate Advisory

Strategic advisory and transaction support across NYC's commercial, residential, and hospitality markets.

  • Due diligence & site evaluation
  • LOI & lease negotiation support
  • Development feasibility studies
  • Investor presentation preparation
  • Capital project planning
Our Work

Project Experience

A selection of projects Chaouki El Rassi and Omar El Rassi have delivered across hospitality, commercial, residential, and civic sectors.

Hospitality
Ritz-Carlton Tysons
Client: Host Hotels & ResortsLocation: Tysons, VA  ·  Cost: $10M  ·  2019–2022

Public space renovations across a 398-key full-service property including Main Lobby, Restaurant & Bar, and Meeting Rooms.

Hospitality
Pendry Hotel Manhattan West
Client: Brookfield PropertiesLocation: New York, NY  ·  Cost: $50M  ·  2021–2022

New 21-story luxury hotel with 164 guest rooms, restaurant, lounge, open-air terrace bar, and event spaces at Manhattan West.

Residential
Repositioning of The Biltmore
Client: Bentall Green OakLocation: New York, NY  ·  Cost: $30M  ·  2019–2024

Project controls and oversight as BGO representative for repositioning of a 464-unit residential building in Midtown Manhattan.

Hospitality
Beach Resort Repositioning
Client: AWRELocation: Montauk, NY  ·  Cost: $200M  ·  2023–2025

Interim repositioning of a 140-key beachfront hotel alongside development planning for a new 92-key hotel and 12 residences.

Hospitality
Freehand Hotel Miami
Client: Queensgate InvestmentsLocation: Miami Beach, FL  ·  2022–2023

Repairs and renovation of facades, AC units, bathrooms, guest rooms, main lobby, and corridors.

Hospitality
The Joshua Tree Resort
Client: Atelier AceLocation: Hempstead, NY  ·  Cost: $100M  ·  2020–2025

88-key hotel and 22 branded residences on 314.6 acres adjacent to Joshua Tree National Park — 215,000 sq ft gross buildable area.

Commercial / Retail

Aggressive multi-site retail expansion across NYC and the greater East Coast — numerous locations delivered under compressed timelines with strict brand standards.

Our People

Leadership

A focused, highly capable team delivering white-glove service on every engagement.

CE
Chaouki El Rassi
Managing Partner

Chaouki applies a practical approach to strategic planning, process management, and delivery across mixed-use, residential, hospitality, and commercial sectors across New York, Washington DC, Miami, and beyond. His particular strength lies with investor and developer entities, providing leadership consulting. Early in his career, Chao was instrumental in a family-owned Architectural & Engineering business providing professional services throughout the Middle East, responsible for design management and construction administration.

Crain's NY — Twenty in Their 20s
OE
Omar El Rassi
Project Manager

With a bachelor's degree in civil engineering and a master's in project management, Omar combines a strong technical foundation with advanced project management expertise. He has contributed to a wide range of projects including residential developments, commercial office spaces, healthcare facilities, and educational institutions. Omar has developed key abilities in organizing teams, delegating tasks, and balancing complex workloads — his adaptability and problem-solving skills make him an asset in managing and driving projects to success.

B.S. Civil Engineering  ·  M.S. Project Management
